description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and warped limbs and body parts. The head is somewhat recognizable, but the rest of the form is stretched and twisted in unnatural ways, with limbs extending at odd angles and merging into thin, ribbon-like structures. The figure seems to be wearing a hooded garment that covers the upper body and head, with the face partially visible. The arms and legs are disproportionately long and thin, with some segments appearing almost flat or blade-like. The overall appearance is surreal and does not correspond to a typical human form, suggesting either a severe modeling error or an intentional artistic abstraction. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with no visible textures or detailed features beyond the basic shapes.
description: A highly distorted, abstract adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, a partially visible face, and a hooded garment. The form is stretched and twisted, giving it a surreal, non-human appearance.
description_view_0: The head and upper body are most visible, with the hooded garment and face partially exposed; limbs are warped and extend outward.
description_view_1: The figure appears almost horizontal, emphasizing the extreme elongation and thinness of the limbs and body.
description_view_2: The abstract, ribbon-like quality of the limbs is most apparent, with the body stretched diagonally across the view.
description_view_3: The head is visible at one end, with the rest of the body and limbs extending in a twisted, angular fashion.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded outerwear with long sleeves and pants
attribute_posture: contorted and elongated, with limbs stretched in unnatural directions
